title: Palpatine (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:EmperorPalpatine-BaseSeries5.png|thumb|right|250px|Emperor Sheev Palpatine]]
'''Palpatine''' might refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Darth Sidious|Sheev Palpatine]]''', the [[Senator]], [[Supreme Chancellor]], [[Galactic Emperor]], and [[Dark Lord of the Sith]], under the Sith title [[Darth]] Sidious
*'''[[Palpatine family]]''', the descendants of [[Emperor]] Palpatine
*The '''[[Palpatine Archive]]''', a [[space station]] located within the [[Corusca sector]] which held valuable artifacts from conquered [[planet]]s

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]''', the [[Senator/Legends|Senator]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]], and [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] from [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*'''[[Cosinga Palpatine]]''', Naboo [[Noble/Legends|aristocrat]] of the [[Royal House of Naboo/Legends|Royal House]] and [[Parent/Legends|father]] to the above
*'''[[House Palpatine/Legends|House Palpatine]]''', later known as the Imperial family, the [[Noble/Legends|noble]] family from Naboo to which Cosinga and his son belonged
*'''[[Palpatine Essex Yerac]]''', better known as '''P. Essex Yerac''', an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*'''[[Palpatine II]]''', editor of the [[Galactic Weekly NewsStack]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Chancellor Palpatine Spaceport]]'''
*'''[[Emperor Palpatine Surgical Reconstruction Center]]'''
*'''[[Palpatine (city)|Palpatine]]''', a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Derilyn]]
*'''[[Palpatine Boulevard]]'''
*'''[[Palpatine Causeway]]'''
*'''[[Palpatine Gardens]]'''
*'''[[Palpatine Parkway]]'''

===Other===
*'''[[Palpatine Cluster]]'''
*'''[[Palpatine Counter-Insurgency Front]]'''
*'''[[Palpatine Mine Network]]'''
*'''''[[Palpatine Triumphant]]''''', a [[Holopainting/Legends|holopainting]] of a glorified Emperor Palpatine

==Real world==
*"'''[[Palpatine (short story)|Palpatine]]'''," a short story in ''[[From a Certain Point of View]]''
*"'''[[Emperor Palpatine (reference book)|''Emperor Palpatine'']]'''," a volume of the [[Star Wars Encyclopedia (series)|''Star Wars Encyclopedia'']]
